_meta.note: No silent correction. Synonyms mapped (owner sign-off); typos flagged only; unknowns quarantined. All await owner review.

owner_signoff.note: Decisions applied to synonym_remaps, typo_flags and unknown_quarantine. authority_results.json (raw GBIF output) left unchanged — human sign-off layer.

gbif_adoption.note: For Pass-2b synonym disagreements, accepted_name switched to GBIF's accepted name; owner/trade name kept in trade_synonyms. gbif_recheck and prior sign-off preserved.
